popularStory.headline: Bela III of Hungary (d 1196) Bio Sketch
popularStory.description:
BIO:  King of Hungary, 1173.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/HUNGARY.htm#ConstanzaMPremyslOtakarIBohemia, as of 10/22/2014
BÉLA, son of GÉZA II King of Hungary & his wife Ievfrosina Mstislavn …

sourceList.title: Bela III of Hungary, "Find A Grave Index"
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - BÉLA (1149-23 Apr 1196, bur Székesfehérvár, transferred to Coronation Church Budapest).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - BÉLA, son of GÉZA II King of Hungary & his wife Ievfrosina Mstislavna of Kiev (1149-23 Apr 1196, bur Székesfehérvár, transferred to Coronation Church Budapest).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király於1148年出生在匈牙利艾斯特格姆艾斯特格姆時，他的父親Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary18歲，母親Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné18歲。他於1170年與Agnes of Antioch結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1196年4月23日在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦享年48歲，埋葬在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király于1148年出生在匈牙利艾斯特格姆艾斯特格姆时，他的父亲Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary18岁，母亲Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné18岁。他于1170年与Agnes of Antioch结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1196年4月23日在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦享年48岁，埋葬在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Béla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hungarian (Béla): from the common Hungarian personal name Béla, which is of uncertain etymology. It may be from the Slavic personal name element bel ‘white’ (see, for example, Belan ), or possibly from Turkish bel ‘waist, loins’, also ‘middle of the back’, or belek ‘gift’. The surname Bela is also found in Romania, Slovenia, and Croatia.
Czech (Běla): from the female personal name Běla, meaning ‘white’. As a surname it denoted the son or husband of a woman so named.
Sorbian (Běla, B'ela, or Běła, B'eła): from a pet form of the Biblical personal name Abel , or a nickname derived from běły ‘white, bright, fair’. Compare Biele , Biehle .

variants.name: Biehle
meanings: German: possibly a topographic name from Biel ‘sloping rock’, or a habitational name from any of several places called Bielau, in Silesia, or Biehla in eastern Germany, or Biele on the Oder river.
German (Westphalia): topographic name for someone who lived by a field that had the shape of a hatchet, from Middle Low German bīl ‘hatchet, axe’.
Germanized form of Sorbian Běla, B'ela, or Běła, B'eła (see Bela 3).

variants.name: Belan
meanings: Croatian and Serbian; Slovak (also Belán, Beláň, Belaň) and Czech (Bělán): nickname for someone with white or very fair hair or a pale complexion, derived from (a dialect form of) Croatian bijel, Serbian beo, Slovak biely, and Czech bílý ‘white, light, fair’. The surname may also be derived from the old personal names, such as Belimir (see Belic ). In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Croatian variant Bjelan. The Sorbian cognate, Bělan, is apparently found in a Germanized form, only (see Bellan ).

variants.name: Belin
meanings: Czech (Bělín): either a nickname from a dialect derivative of Czech bílý ‘white’ or a derivative of the female personal name Běla (see Bela ).
Croatian: cognate of   Belan   and   Belina  . Compare   Bellin  .
French (also Bélin): nickname from a diminutive of bélier ‘ram’, borne by a ram in the medieval literary cycle Reynard the Fox (in French: Roman de Renart).

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király was born in 1148, in Esztergom, Esztergom, Hungary, his father, Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary, was 18 and his mother, Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné, was 18. He married Agnes of Antioch in 1170. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 April 1196, in Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungary, at the age of 48, and was buried in Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungary.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király est né en 1148, à Esztergom, Esztergom, Hongrie, son père, Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Agnes of Antioch en 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1196, à Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hongrie, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hongrie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király 1148 in Esztergom, Esztergom, Ungarn geboren wurde, war sein Vater Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary 18 und seine Mutter Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné 18. Er hat 1170 Agnes of Antioch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. April 1196 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Stuhlweißenburg, Stuhlweißenburg, Ungarn und wurde in Stuhlweißenburg, Stuhlweißenburg, Ungarn begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király è nato il nel 1148 nel Esztergom, Esztergom, Ungheria, il suo padre, Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Agnes of Antioch nel 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1196, nel Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Ungheria, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Ungheria.

ja.lifeSummary: Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar királyが1148年にハンガリーエスズテルゴムエスズテルゴムで生まれた時，父Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungaryは18歳，母Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királynéは18歳であった。1170年にAgnes of Antiochと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1196年4月23日にハンガリーフエジeルスズeケスフエheルvaルで48歳で死去し，ハンガリーフエジeルスズeケスフエheルvaルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király(이)가 1148년 헝가리 스즈터고 스즈터고에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1170년 Agnes of Antioch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1196년 4월 23일 헝가리 프제이e르 스즈e케스프he르브a르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 헝가리 프제이e르 스즈e케스프he르브a르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király nasceu em 1148, em Esztergom, Esztergom, Hungria, seu pai, Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes of Antioch em 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1196, em Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungria, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungria.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király родился в 1148 г. в местности эсзтиргом, эсзтиргом, Венгрия, его отцу по имени Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes of Antioch в 1170 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 апреля 1196 г. в местности сзeкесфэeрвaр, феджeр, Венгрия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности сзeкесфэeрвaр, феджeр, Венгрия.

sm.from 1172 to 1196: mai le 1172 e o'o I le 1196

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Árpád-házi Béla III. Magyar király nació en 1148, en Esztergom, Esztergom, Hungría, su papá, Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Agnes of Antioch en 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1196, en Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungría, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungría.
